REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF JONATHAN MILES' MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND SUBSTITUTE REDACTED DOCUMENT IS DENIED IN CASE CGC-25-627906. ON ITS OWN MOTION, THE COURT DIRECTS THE CLERK OF THE COURT IS ORDERED TO FILE A REDACTED VERSION OF JUNE 13, 2025 NOTICE OF MOTION TO AMEND PETITION IN CASE CPF-25-519084 JONATHAN MILES TO PREPARE A REDACTED VERSION OF THE DOCUMENT AND SUBMIT IT TO THE CLERK'S OFFICE FOR FILING. UPON FILING OF THE REDACTED DOCUMENT, THE CLERK OF THE COURT SHALL REMOVE THE UNREDACTED VERSION FROM THE PUBLIC VIEW. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Seal Records And Substitute Redacted Document
Off Calendar Sep-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JONATHAN MILES' MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND SUBSTITUTE REDACTED DOCUMENT is DENIED in case CGC-25-627906. On its own motion, the Court directs the clerk of the Court is ordered to file a redacted version of June 13, 2025 Notice of Motion to Amend Petition in case CPF-25-519084 Jonathan Miles to prepare a redacted version of the document and submit it to the Clerk's office for filing. Upon filing of the redacted document, the Clerk of the Court shall remove the unredacted version from the public view.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
